global_description: Large bear-like mammal with a distinctive black and white coat, round body, and a gentle expression. Its fur is thick and woolly, with black patches around the eyes, ears, and limbs. The rest of the body is predominantly white, providing a striking contrast.

part_details.head: Round with black patches around the eyes and small black ears
part_details.body: Large and round, covered in thick white fur
part_details.limbs: Short and sturdy, black in color

spatial_relations: Limbs attached to sides of body
